input_init: h_in0[i] = static_cast<float>(i % 11) - 5.0f; h_in1[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 3) % 13) - 6.0f; h_in2[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 7) % 17) - 8.0f;
golden_code: float mx = in0_ref; if (in1_ref > mx) mx = in1_ref; if (in2_ref > mx) mx = in2_ref; float mn = in0_ref; if (in1_ref < mn) mn = in1_ref; if (in2_ref < mn) mn = in2_ref; expected0 = mx - mn;
